scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @green-flag/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @green-flag/contracts build && corepack pnpm --filter @green-flag/db build && corepack pnpm --filter @green-flag/api build && corepack pnpm --filter @green-flag/web build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm --filter @green-flag/shared typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @green-flag/contracts typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @green-flag/db typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @green-flag/api typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @green-flag/web typecheck
